_comment: The 7 content angles. feature x angle = the unique-post matrix. prompt_guidance is injected into the caption LLM prompt. best_formats steers the format picker (we build CAROUSEL, STORY, SINGLE — Reels deferred).

angles.name: Tutorial / How-To
angles.description: Step-by-step walkthrough of using the feature.
angles.prompt_guidance: Teach the reader how to use the feature in clear numbered steps. Hook with the outcome they get ('Measure your field in 60 seconds — here's how'). Be concrete and practical.
angles.cta_style: Try it yourself — link in bio

angles.name: Feature Highlight
angles.description: Showcase what the feature does and the wow factor.
angles.prompt_guidance: Lead with the single most impressive thing this feature does. Keep it punchy and benefit-first. Make the reader think 'I didn't know an app could do that.'

angles.name: Real-World Use Case
angles.description: A relatable story of someone using the feature to solve a real problem.
angles.prompt_guidance: Open with a relatable situation for the target audience ('Buying a plot and not sure of its real size?'). Show how the feature solves it. Be human and specific.
angles.cta_style: Solve yours too — get the app

angles.name: Tip / Hidden Trick
angles.description: A lesser-known tip or power-user trick for the feature.
angles.prompt_guidance: Share a 'most people don't know this' tip about the feature. Make it feel like insider knowledge worth saving.

angles.name: Comparison / Before-After
angles.description: Contrast the old/hard way with the app's way.
angles.prompt_guidance: Contrast the painful manual way (hiring a surveyor, measuring tape, guessing) against doing it in the app. Make the app's advantage obvious without bashing competitors by name.
angles.cta_style: Skip the hard way — download free

angles.name: FAQ / Common Question
angles.description: Answer a question the audience actually asks.
angles.prompt_guidance: Answer one common question about the feature directly ('Can I measure area without internet?'). Be honest and only claim what the feature actually does.

angles.name: Behind the Scenes / How It Works
angles.description: Explain how the feature works under the hood, simply.
angles.prompt_guidance: Explain in plain language how the feature works (GPS points, polygon math, etc.) so the reader trusts its accuracy. Educational, builds credibility.
